holdings.infoBox: RWK is an equity ETF with a total of 400 individual holdings. The top holdings are TD SYNNEX stock at 4.10%, Performance Food Group Company at 2.88%, American Airlines Group at 2.74%, Albertsons Companies at 2.62%, and Flex Ltd. at 2.34%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P MidCap 400 Revenue ETF (RWK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P MidCap 400 Revenue-Weighted index. The fund tracks a revenue-weighted index of US stocks from the committee-selected S&P MidCap 400. RWK was launched on Feb 22, 2008 and is issued by Invesco.
